所以一般情况下极致稳妥的打法可能是通过符来反复把npc拉起来 把boss耗死 到这里为止都很正常对吧 直到我看见一个刚复活的npc保持着跑动的动作卡在了场地的障碍上 对 就是那个开局可以用来挡碎星大狙的障碍物 场地上有很多 我还得亲自动手去把障碍打掉 这帮弱智外援才走得动路 不好意思 这时候我实在没法说服自己这是一道考验了 什么叫你想营造一个声势浩大的车轮战场面结果参与大战的人员连他妈遇到路障拐个弯都不会 再配上这个boss的各种野蛮得要死的大范围攻击手段 那可太享受了 宫崎英高小时候参加校运会接力赛 接棒的队友踢到一个跟自己脚趾头一般大的小石子就直接原地罚站了 必须要小高自己去把小石子踢开队友才跑得动 接着来说地图关卡这一块 按理说应该是吹这款游戏的那帮人最有底气的部分了吧?广受好评的箱庭 四通八达的巧妙路线设计 为了恶作剧而刻意设计的初见杀 转角处决 在道具边上塞致死量的小怪诱惑我用命去换 误人子弟 一周目尽量不看攻略跑图 以保障沉浸感的 哥们都要不知道接下来能往哪走了你还在强调引导破碎是游戏的一部分吗 不知道从哪冒出来的遗老就是见不得新人玩得比自己舒服 这就是典型的第一类人了 缺爱 自己淋过雨就要求后来者也不准打伞 神经病来的 那些 玩家 你们都是一丘之貉 我说地图恶心 他们要说 有轮椅呀 我说所谓的轮椅 实际上这个游戏根本不存在任何一个能够称作轮椅的物品 有些东西我能拿得到的时候就已经不怎么需要它了 而那些相对易于获取的 严谨地来说只能称作强力武器 物品 远没有达到能让人抛弃大脑的程度 都有获取门槛 他们说 探索一下就找到了 就好像上学时父母和你说 努力一下就轻松了 一样扯淡 这时候就已经没有沟通的必要了 有些人已经被魂游这种由童年不幸的孤儿设计出的残缺产品驯化了 也许早就对恶意和愚蠢失去了判断力 在这一作我们的boss强度会相对的高 因为我们提供了骨灰这种选项 那为了防止玩家体会不到老魂游的劲道怎么办呢 那当然是给骨灰一个独立的等级系统了 至于前期怎么升级骨灰 那当然是探索我们经典的地下墓地来采花 感受最纯正的恶作剧了 给你塞点屎进来好让你别忘了艾尔登法环是一款魂系游戏 我就问一个问题 你配吗 针对这种阴暗闭塞的小图 社区的态度似乎更多是调侃而非攻击 诸如地下墓地 各种洞窟 雾霾大雪原 王城臭水沟这种几乎是屎尿屁级别的设计 大多数人在讨论时形成了一种怪风气 就是会去比哪一个更粪 以至于忘了攻击一下作为罪魁祸首的设计者 在我看来属实是给你脸给多了

review:
This was my first Fromsoft game. 
I was scared to play it because of the notorious difficulty their games often have, my boyfriend encouraging me to try it and friends followed. Reluctantly I gave in and now this is by far one of the best games I've ever played. Story, vibes, music, gameplay and most of all general feel. 
I find it to be a fantastic video game just across the board and recommend it to truly everyone. It's only hard if you refuse to learn from your mistakes and can't look within for your error-- It's generally very fair and forgiving when you take your time and take heart to every small visual lesson provided to you.

There's a playstyle for a little of everything. Even if you're an aggressive player like me, there's builds you can depend on and thrive. The magic feels good, the Oonga Boonga strength builds feel insane and best of all the huge assortment of incredibly designed outfits you'll find across the complexly built world. Every twist and turn rewards the greediness of adventuring-- Or punishes you delightfully for trying.

I love Elden Ring and I don't think I've left the story the same person as when I started.

review:
Elden ring is easily one of my favorite games of all time, and likely one of the greatest games ever made. Maybe the only flaw with it is performance. I have roughly 300 hours played on PS5 and was hoping I could play at a higher framerate on PC - nope, locked 60. Luckily NVIDIA smooth motion exists so I can force 120.

Other than that, a great game filled with challenges that will fill you with pride when you overcome them and tons of exploration and character/build customization to be had. I would recommend this to anyone who doesn't rage-quit easily and enjoys a game that doesn't hold your hand.

review:
Elden Ring is a great game with great gameplay, impressive graphics, and a fantastic world to explore. However, the game gives you very little guidance and doesn't tell you much about the story, which made it hard for me to stay invested.

One thing I didn't like was that you can spend hours fighting a difficult boss, only to get a 10-second cutscene as a reward. I found that pretty disappointing. The same thing happened at the end of the game as well.

In the end, Elden Ring just wasn't for me. Despite that, I still finished the entire game. My personal rating is 6/10.

The blood volume is also weaker than the undead in the previous game. The undead will take 4 hits to die. The faded ones are as useless as babies. You can’t add evil buffs for a few more rounds of trial and error. Why bother? It was enjoyable before the royal city. But after the snowfield, the experience took a turn for the worse. It is not that the hope tolerance is high. The game at least gives a chance for trial and error, otherwise it will be a teardrop brother. Ah, I've had enough red tape. Shield stamp.

review:
本体可以称得上是无瑕之作了，精彩的战斗演出，丰富的战斗流派，精妙的地图设计，最顶级的美术，甚至就连诟病的弱引导和碎片叙事都从某种方面加强了游戏的真实感，真的会让人沉浸其中。
当然这一切是在玩家会去查找攻略的前提下，不然体验感会下降很多，某种意义上社区丰富的攻略和讨论度也让游戏更加容易上手。
至于dlc黄金树之影，单论美术和大地图设计是绝妙无比的，多重地图高度，多种推图路线，一切又都汇到一个点，但是这种高低差并没有做好地图适配，导致篝火点分不清高低，看地图很难判断在哪；然后就是剧情体验，支线少，最后一个地图和主线也是草草结尾，剧情也是没有本体那种史诗感，cg也很少，玩家戏份也很少，刚打完dlc那几分钟我甚至还在疑惑这就结束了？本体还有个褪色者成王的cg，结果dlc最后就看个米凯拉的回忆，沟子文学真不感兴趣。
总的来说dlc虽然拉了，但至少是及格线以上的，8/10吧，本体9.9/10。

Of course, all this is under the premise that players will search for strategies, otherwise the experience will be reduced a lot. In a sense, the community's rich strategies and discussions also make the game easier to get started. As for the dlc Shadow of the Golden Tree, In terms of art and large map design alone, it is incomparable. Multiple map heights, multiple push routes, and everything converges to one point. However, this height difference does not allow for map adaptation. It makes it difficult to tell the height of the campfire point. It is difficult to judge where it is when looking at the map. Then there is the plot experience. There are few branch lines. The last map and the main line also end hastily. The plot also lacks the epic feeling of the main line. There are also very few CGs and very few player scenes. In the few minutes after finishing the DLC, I was even wondering if it was over. The main body also has a CG in which the faded person becomes the king. As a result, the dlc ends with Michaela’s memories. I’m really not interested in Mizoko’s literature. In general, although the dlc is poor, it’s at least above the passing mark. 8 out of 10. The main body is 9.9 10.

The only thing I don’t understand is whether the task design system can really be successfully completed if the player does not read the guide. The essence is that the production team does not know the real story content and only has a rough setting framework. review:
Elden Ring is more than just a game to me—it is a masterpiece. From the moment I stepped into the Lands Between, I felt a sense of wonder and adventure unlike anything I had experienced before. Every region, dungeon, hidden path, and mysterious corner felt worth exploring, and I made it my goal to discover every little area the world had to offer.

What makes Elden Ring so special is the freedom it gives players. The world is vast, beautiful, and filled with secrets that reward curiosity. Every victory against a difficult boss felt earned, and every new discovery created a memorable experience. The atmosphere, music, lore, and world design all come together perfectly to create an unforgettable journey.

The Lands Between became a place where I created many great memories. Whether it was finding a hidden cave, overcoming a challenging enemy after countless attempts, or simply riding across the breathtaking landscapes, the game constantly gave me moments that stayed with me long after I put down the controller.

For me, Elden Ring is not just one of the best games I have played—it is an adventure I will always remember. It is a rare game that inspires exploration, rewards perseverance, and leaves players with stories of their own. A true masterpiece.

review:
I finished the base game, got 100% achievements, completed Shadow of the Erdtree, and somehow I still want to keep playing.

Elden Ring took me a while to really understand. I was confused at first, especially with the builds, quests, and where to go, but once it clicked, it became really hard to put down.

The exploration is probably my favorite part. There’s always something weird, cool, or unexpected waiting somewhere, and the game keeps rewarding you for being curious. The combat also feels great, especially once you find a build that fits you.

It’s not perfect. Some quests are too vague, some bosses can be really annoying, and the DLC can feel brutal at first. But even with those things, this is easily one of the best games I’ve ever played.

130 hours in, and I still don’t feel completely done with it.

review:
I can say that this game is first of all very good of course like every other game there are some improvement to be made but i think that the game is great enough as it is, well the quests would be really good if we had a quest journal but there was never one in the soul series to begin with so it's not unbeareble.
The boss design are beautifull and the fights also, just remember the first boss will be always a skill check don't you dare go hollow and forget your mission even if you have to use everything at your disposal.
The DLC is a masterclass at every level so if you've liked the base game i fortly recomment playing the dlc.
The open world is incredible even if it seems a little empty in certain places like the lake of rot.
The graphisms are also realy good in particulary in limgrave where the first time you find the open world you are mesmerised by the scenery.
The build variety is also enormous, multiple weapond at disposal without even counting the sorceries and all so you can literally play whatever you like just don't show your magic build to a dark souls or elden ring veteran you will be hated just stay out of the hardcore community it's better for your sanity.
I strongly recommend this game at a 10 out of 10 rating go play it you will have a good time.

review: This is the best game i have ever played by far. Not only has it been an awesome game and experience it has also shaped the person I am and have become. The scenery is beautiful, its challenging but also so very rewarding. It rewards exploration and discovery more than any other game i have played except maybe skyrim. You cant always expect to beat a boss first try, there is a lot of trial and error and there is no "correct" way to play or beat the game, i have beat the game with several different builds. I am on NG+7 and i can tell you that as long as you have fun and make builds you enjoy you will love this game.

Idk how they were able to fit this much game into one game, but it runs surprisingly well*. This is my Skyrim 2, but with actual fun combat and build potential for so much replayability.

*Easy anticheat can f off though with causing its constant random crashes. Never has it given me this many issues with any other game that uses it. Thankfully they let you play offline if you want.

Weak story aside, its timeless world and sandbox has made me feel almost every possible emotion through gameplay and environments alone. 

Sad I waited so many years to play it.
~A soulsgame ex-hater <3

review:
so far? solid 9.5/10 game, runs perfectly on my pc, FPS takes a hit at limgrave, however, it remains completely stable and playable, except a few times where it has dipped to under 20FPS, then it becomes borderline unplayable, especially if it happens during a boss fight -> i am assuming that is an issue with the coop mod and not the game itself however, and the game will realise if your frame rate is too low or if your internet is bugging out and will give you a popup before returning you to single player -> Im running the game on med-high graphics, with 1440p resolution, graphics card is a 1660TI (6GB) - not sure why steam says otherwise -> also runs flawlessly on linux, ive played on both windows 10 and linux mint 22.3, and ive noticed a slight increase in performance now im using linux, SSD isnt really needed at all either, I have my game on one purely to have load screens end faster - since the latest update for steam itself thoug, opening the map on controller bugs out and instead changes my overall PC volume aswell this is easily fixed by unplugging and replugging the controller each time - and im 100% sure it is a steam issue, but this is the only game where i have encountered this issue

more onto the game:
Ive wanted to play this game since it released on my 18th birthday, however put it off until earlier this year, purely because at that time i only really used to stick to games like fallout, cod and fortnite, I then bought Dark Souls 2 when it was on sale towards the start of this year and ended up really enjoying souls like games, after 100% Scholar of first sin I immediately decided I was finally going to buy this game, managed to hold out long enough and picked up base game for £25.

map detailing is incredible, and the game manages to look amazing at almost any frame rate, boss fight arenas are well designed and usually you can guess what kind of attacks to expect by the arena you're in, I havent had any issues with this game as someone with aracnaphobia, but when the crawling hand things attack you, it is incredibly spider-like and did freak me out, If you survived dark souls 2 spiders, theres nothing to really worry about in terms of that. I also havent struggled with the game at all in terms of accessibility, Having epilepsy i was worried about playing this game, as I was and still am trying my hardest to avoid any and all spoilers, aside from the names of bosses that come with the steam achivements, I've had no issues with photosensitivity at all with this game, however i do recommend getting a blue light filter or anti glare if you do wear glasses as its made a massive difference for me with gaming overall.

Only issue ive really had is the typical from software thing of being incredibly indirect with quests - but thankfully ive been playing through the game with my boyfriend and he thankfully keeps track of it all for me, in addition to a spreadsheet for all the bosses in the game, otherwise the game feels incredibly easy in terms of a linear path of what to do or where to go next, I much prefer this entry by from software to dark souls 2, and so far its made me want to eventually buy and 100% all the games they have released on steam - combat is massively improved, I havent encountered any game breaking bugs, Elden ring just feels a hell of a lot more immersive than any games i have previously played -> and once we are done with an area or boss, i then see content from other people on social media and its pretty cool to look at and just see how everyone else is progressing - will probably be picking up the DLC in the summer sale in the coming weeks aswell before progressing to nightrein

review:
Elden Ring,
 ist definitiv eines der besten Games der letzten Jahre, wenn man damit klarkommt, dass man nicht alles beim ersten Mal schafft und bereit dafür ist, auch ein bisschen zu leiden. Man braucht Skill und es ist definitiv kein Spiel für jedermann. Das Spiel zeichnet sich besonders durch die Open World und die unzähligen Möglichkeiten aus. Das einzig Schlechte am Spiel war für mich, dass man sich für den Multiplayer eine Mod herunterladen musste, weil der Multiplayer im Spiel nicht wirklich gut ist. 

Insgesamt ist es eines meiner Lieblingsspiele und ein wirklich gutes Spiel.
 Es ist aber kein Spiel für jeden!

review_english: Elden Ring is definitely one of the best games in recent years if you can accept the fact that you won't be able to do everything the first time and are willing to suffer a little. You need skill and it's definitely not a game for everyone. The game is particularly characterized by the open world and the countless possibilities. The only bad thing about the game for me was that you had to download a mod for the multiplayer because the multiplayer in the game isn't really that good. Overall it's one of my favorite games and a really good game. But it's not a game for everyone!

review: Худшая и одновременно лучшая игра сосадзаки, пик синема в одних моментах и совершенно обрыганная тупорылая дрочь в других. Есть крайне фановые и круто сделанные боссы, есть блядские отрыжки которые я не понимаю как оказались в игре. Катаю обзор на моменте пещеры в звездных пустошах где на крышах лачуг сидят сраные жуки с охуительным набором комбух которые ведут себя максимально непредсказуемо и могут как по нормальному спрыгнуть к тебе и дать возможность их убить, так и упрыгать глубоко вниз и в три морды начать лупить по тебе издалека самонаводящимися многочисленными снарядами и упрыгивать за два километра от тебя при попытке их убить. Чтобы пройти дальше к боссу будь добр сиди ♥♥♥♥♥ прыжки на крышу до посинения пока не научишься с определенного пикселя на бегу запрыгивать. Абсолют дезигн. Доходишь до босса, босс тебя прыжком и последующим колесом игнорируя любые форточки от перекатов размазывает о землю И РЯДОМ НЕТ КЛИНА. БЕГИ ЧЕРЕЗ ЖУКОВ. СНОВА. фу. Насколько бы ни была хороша игра, но она совершенно нагло чисто паприколу ыыыы ну просто паржать тратит нервы игрока на какую-то ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ вместо того чтобы давать реальные скилчеки.

review: Incredible game. Arguably the base game is better than the DLC, though opinions may vary on that. Please do not go into the game expecting to know what to do or where to go right from the start. If you do, you will become frustrated very quickly. Pay attention to the story and do the NPC quests and you'll have a great time. Patience is rewarding and not every enemy or area needs to be brute forced. Worth the money but as per the norm for Steam, it's probably not worth to buy at full price.

review: After beating the base game multiple times, getting all achievements, and playing through with different builds, I can say that this game is unparalleled when it comes to RPG games. It is beautiful in both scenery, soundtrack, and character design. Boss fights are my favorite part about this game, and the combat feels nice for all types of builds. Although, I do feel like the multiplayer experience is left wanting. Not an easy game to just jump into with friends, as the requirement for all players to have each traveled to that location in their own save (by themselves) is not a seamless multiplayer experience. But, under the right conditions, it is a great game to play with your friends and show off cool attacks and spells while defeating bosses. I don't like to PVP so I can't speak toward that part of the game but being invaded is fun sometimes. Overall, I rate it a 10/10 single player experience and a 8/10 multiplayer experience.

review: I'm on like my 4th run through of this game and every time I play is more invigorating than the last. Despite what the haters say the non linear style of play in this game far exceeds games like dark souls while those are great games they aren't elden ring. I still believe bosses like Fire Giant and Godskin Duo are reasons why stoning should be brought back as a capital punishment This game is everything I ever dreamed of in terms of fun and difficulty. Please don't let anyone try to gaud you into thinking playing a specific way means you didn't deserve your win. In my eyes as long as you are fighting and the boss has every opportunity to fight back you earned your win. This easily deserved every award it got and then some. I have yet to play the DLC however and I cant wait for that. Words cant describe how much I recommend this game

review:
5 stars

From the creator of Dork Souls and Game ol Throws

Elden Ring is a high fantasy game and a "what if Dark Souls and Skyrim had a baby". The combat is very high paced comparable to Bloodborne while keeping the clunkiness (realism) of Souls game, have a wide variety of arsenal from magic, faith, blood, and swords. Although while the weapons and magics seems to be balanced around PvE, the PvP is is still enjoyable to various degree with the addition of Arena. As for the exploration, the player is able to ride a horse to travel around the huge Lands' Between, similar to Skyrim.

The bosses' fights are top notch, ranged from a huge old man who filters the player with its difficulty, an epic raid boss, to a gigantic alien with cosmos inside its body. The players may encounter some bosses with numbers advantage on them, which comes the time when co-op comes in handy. Some of the bosses' fights also encourage the players to try different built which makes the game very diverse.

The visuals are very stellar. It doesn't come with a lot of NVIDIA enchantments aside from the ray tracing, but the grasses, scenic locations, weathers, gravity and special effects are enough to activate the neurons of the players. Even better, the weathers and locations affects the gameplay, adding more realism to the game.

The lore comes in various angle and up to players' interpretation while keeping the original writers style. For example in layman's term, the players started with nothing (just like when they're born), then they met someone who told them they're unfortunately maidenless (telling the players to get laid) and told them to become Elden Lord (encouraging the players to become the King of their own, and start a family perhaps).

All in all, Elden Ring may be a complete game that people have been wanting for a decade, especially for Souls and Elder Scrolls fans. Just play it in a healthy manner as to not forget the message of the game (such as stuck in Lands' Between and forgot outside the mum' basement).

10/10 would play every year.

review: Just play ds1 or ds3. The system and the mechanics of the game is good (ashes of war), but there is a ton of hyper agressive enemy even in early game and the game expects you to fight them early, because the amount of runes they gave is pocket change. The open world is confusing, if you dont clear random hidden part of the map (if you can even find them without a guide) than you will be under leveled and under ecquiped for the later bosses. The secrets is closer to be an og cod or bf easter eggs compared to ds1 and 3 where it was clever game design.    Story is very good tho and the design of the world and npc is awesome too, for me the Ds series is more straight forward than elden.

review:
9.3/10
一场奇幻瑰丽的冒险，或许这就是我一直梦中的剑与魔法的世界。
优点：
1. 壮阔、瑰丽、极富史诗感的美术表现，风格独一无二，足以承受任何溢美之词，完全掩盖了材质画面上的劣势
2. 近乎恐怖的体量，即使是漏了无数支线仍需花费120+小时通关并达成全成就
3. 无比丰富的RPG系统，魂游至此尽已！

缺点：
1. 过于强调轮椅和骨灰的重要性导致Boss体验非常之差，在1v1的情况下强制背板Boss的粪招，招骨灰又过于无趣，体验十分割裂；Boss的Hitbox和快慢刀设计简直不像是一个常年做ARPG的工作室出手的作品，建议开除战斗负责人
2. 支线在不看攻略的情况下几乎无法正常推进，开放大世界配合FS的弱引导达成了近乎灾难级别的表现
3. 本体的体验在王城及之前达到顶峰，之后一路下滑，雪山太空、圣树太粪、天空城一本道

尽管这样我还是愿意给它9+，所谓爱之深责之切大致如此，感谢法环带给我这一段难忘的旅程

review: Recently, with the increasingly popularity, open-world games have over-saturated the market. This resulted in me getting bored of the style. I tried playing elden ring once a couple years back and didnt get far because I didnt feel motivated to start another open-world game. The genre had started to feel exhausting to play. I figured maybe souls games with more linear progression like DS1 was more my cup of tea. However, after being convinced to return after watching streamers and full immersing myself into the lore, I got addicted. I think Elden Ring brought back my love for open-world games. 5 years late to the party, but to anyone who's yet to play it, I would definitely recommend it

review: Hands down one of THE best games I have ever played! This game honestly feels like Fromsoftware's magnum opus and it's hard for me to imagine them ever topping what they have achieved with this incredible game, and that's a massive amount of praise considering that almost every game they have made ended up being a masterpiece in it's own right. If you're thinking about getting into soulsborne games and you aren't sure which one to start with, then honestly Elden ring is absolutely your best choice because not only it's the best Fromsoftware game ever (imo) but it also happened to be the most accessible one to new players who aren't used to this kind of difficulty and lack of hand holding.

review: Elden Ring is easily a top 5 game of all time for me. Across PS4, PS5, and now PC, I've poured countless hours into the Lands Between and still find myself getting completely immersed. The world is breathtaking, mysterious, and packed with rewarding exploration around every corner. What makes it stand out from other Souls games is its incredible sense of freedom. You can tackle challenges at your own pace, wander off to discover new areas, level up, and return stronger. The combat is satisfying, the boss fights are unforgettable, and the atmosphere is second to none. Whether you're a Souls veteran or a newcomer, Elden Ring is a masterpiece that can keep you hooked for hundreds of hours. An absolute must play!

review: Most of my playtime for this game is on Xbox which was over 200 hours of playtime but wanted to post a review on here since I have switched to PC after playing the game for so long. This is my third favorite game, only overshadowed by Sekiro and Dark Souls 3. The world, combat, and the story is as close to perfect as it can get. My first playthrough was very special to me as it was my first souls-like at the time of release. I have never felt more immersed by a game in my entire life. There aren't many games that leave me wanting more and more, but this is definitely one of them. Elden Ring has almost an infinite amount of replay value and it is by far a must play for anyone that enjoys RPGs, open world games, or if you just want a game that will challenge you. This game has an extreme amount of content especially if you play the DLC as well. 10/10

review:
очень классная, красивая игра, огромная. но почему у миядзаки какая то мания на убийство всех персонажей, с которыми можно взаимодействовать, либо они становятся сумасшедшими и нападают на тебя в виде фантома. 
к середине игры весь мой круглый стол просто опустел, не осталось никого только бабки, пожиратель отбросов и кузнец с красной шапкой. это минус вайбит очень. 

почти все нпс после диалога спавнятся в такой заднице без каких либо указателей, что без гайдов их не найти. да и в целом по взаимодействию с квестами, ценное дают там от силы 3 квестовые линии.

по боссам это однозначно намного сложнее дс3 если проходить без духов и фантомов. с духами будет проще чем дс3. плюс здесь очень многие боссы не прощают фейсролл, сбивают тебе питьё фляг и задерживают удар при перекате.

игра ваще не линейная, мало указателей куда ваще тебе надо двигаться, это создает странное впечатление, когда ты исследуешь мир и не находишь там особо нихера, потому что во первых карта просто огроменная, а шмотки в пещерах или любых объектах практически это какие то стрелы, ненужные справочники и пеплы войны. а реально полезные шмотки находятся в супер неочевидных местах, которые без гайдов ты все точно не найдешь. может 1-3 штучки чисто случайно.

короче даже с учетом этого однозначно стоит поиграть, потому что это просто придирки, в целом игра офигенная, но как будто без подсказок извне не обойтись, особенно по началу игры. я начал без каких либо подсказок и словил тильт, я бы советовал чекнуть что можно найти и куда следует идти, иначе будет плохое настроение, особенно если вы не выносите духоту. с гайдиком на начальный прокач фиксится дальше можно уже самим бегать.

review_english: very cool, beautiful game, huge. but why does Miyazaki have some kind of mania for killing all the characters with whom you can interact, or they become crazy and attack you in the form of a phantom. By the middle of the game, my entire round table was simply empty, there was no one left, only the grandmother, the garbage eater and the blacksmith with a red hat. This is a very minus vibe. Almost all NPCs after the dialogue will spawn in such a mess without any indicators that they cannot be found without guides. and in general, in terms of interaction with quests, there are at most 3 quest lines that provide valuable value. As for the bosses, this is definitely much more difficult than DS3 if you go through without spirits and phantoms. with perfume it will be easier than ds3. Plus, many bosses here don’t forgive facerolls, knocking off your drinking flasks and delaying your blow when rolling. The game is not linear at all, there are few pointers where you should go, this creates a strange impression when you explore the world and don’t find much shit there, because firstly the map is simply huge, and the clothes in the caves or any objects are practically some kind of arrows, unnecessary reference books and ashes of war. and the really useful items are in super unobvious places that you definitely won’t find without guides. maybe 1-3 things purely by chance. in short, even taking this into account, it’s definitely worth playing, because these are just nitpicks, overall the game is awesome, but it’s as if you can’t do without outside hints, especially at the beginning of the game. I started without any prompts and caught a tilt, I would advise you to check what you can find and where to go, otherwise you will be in a bad mood, especially if you can’t stand the stuffiness. with the guide for the initial pumping fixed, then you can run on your own.

review:
Eu definitivamente nao gostava de Soulslike, mas esse jogo meus amigos...

Esse é o apice do conceito de exploraçao, de voce descobrir as coisas mesmo sem ajuda de marcadores, e tudo é muito recompensador. Tem bastante variedade de armas que muda completamente sua gameplay, tanto na questão da build, quanto no combate.

Os boss principais sao epicos, todas as batalhas sao epicas, voce é frequentemente moletado por eles no game, mas te da uma vontade estranha de querer tentar denovo, porque o game te da condiçoes de passar por eles

Em todas as minhas 70 horas nao tive um momento de tedio

Acredito que o unico problema dele é a quantidade repetida de alguns bosses secundarios

It has a wide variety of weapons that completely changes your gameplay, both in terms of build and combat. The main bosses are epic, all the battles are epic, you are often harassed by them in the game, but it gives you a strange desire to try again, because the game gives you the conditions to go through them In all my 70 hours I haven't had a dull moment I believe the only problem with it is the repeated number of some secondary bosses

review:
소울류 입문작으로 강추. 살면서 한번은 해보자.
난이도가 소울류 치고는 엄청 쉽다. 사람들이 트리가드한테 뚝배기깨지는 것만 봐서 어려워 보이다가도, 이게 오픈월드라는걸 깨닫고 파밍을 시작해버리면 난이도가 확 내려가서 개꿀잼 틈새의땅 여행기를 찍을 수 있다. 실제로 화신의 물방울 풀강하고 모독의 성검 얻고 나서는 모든 보스들 거의 5트 이내로 잡음.

영체라는 새로운 시스템을 무조건 쓰도록 만들게 설계된 보스들, 계속 도망만 다녀서 좀 짜치는 막보만 제외하면 플레이하는 내내 너무 즐거웠다.

9월 4일에 실크송이 안나왔으면 더 꼼꼼하게 했을텐데 일단 마누라니 엔딩으로 1회차 끝내고 나중에 이어서 해야지.
일단 빨리 할로우나이트 달려잇

review_english: Highly recommended as an introduction to Soul genre. Let's do it once in our life. The difficulty level is very easy for a Souls type game. It may seem difficult because people only see the pot being broken by Tree Guard, but when you realize that this is an open world and start farming, the difficulty level goes down drastically and you can take a fun travelogue of the land of the gaps. In fact, after getting the Avatar Droplet at full strength and the Holy Sword of Desecration, I defeated almost all bosses within 5 points. The bosses were designed to force you to use the new system called spirit body, and except for the last boss who kept running away and was a bit annoying, I had a lot of fun playing it. If Silk Song hadn't come out on September 4th, I would have done it more thoroughly, but I had to finish the first episode with the wife ending and continue later. First, hurry up and run to Hollow Knight.

review:
Как и всегда, игра состоит из ассетов прошлых частей (как бы это и не плохо, если грамотно их применить). Мир большой, но с наполнением... 50/50 Игра поощряет на исследования(прахи/пушки/доспехи), но и бывает так, что награда не соответствует тому, через что прошел (данж с двумя котятками и улиткой - яркие тому примеры). Благо, в длц с наградами, относительно, всё в порядке, хоть и не без огрехов.
По врагам всё +- хорошо, кроме перекрашиваний одних и тех же солдат с рыцарями (и добавлении пары новых прёмов). 
Мини-боссы (редкие типы с полоской хп): птички, рыцари горнила, деревья и червяки с апостолом/аристократом доставляют немало проблем при первых встречах с ними. И, нередко, удивляют чем то новым при следующих встречах. Хочу выделить отдельно Олега в замке Сол. Да, боссом он не является, но силен и доставит немало проблем.
Мини-боссы (часто встречающиеся мобы с полоской хп) - без комментариев. Просто ненужные и не к месту используемые. Причем награда за их убийство - смех да и только. Да, есть исключения (амулет рёва, якорь, колокольные сферы к примеру), но на то они и исключения, что их мало.
Боссы именитые (сюжетные/побочные): тут всё прекрасно и шикарно, но с оговоркой. Представьте, вы приходите на драку, и уже на месте выясняется, что у оппонента шипастый кастет и пистолет с траншейным дробовиком. У тебя же - голые кулаки и желание свалить с этого вятского цирка. И в процессе еще выясняется, что на соседних крышах дежурят его снайпера, а в случае твоей победы, есть шанс загреметь в тюрьму и выплатить компенсацию. Именно так ощущается драка с сюжетными пацанами и пацанессами. Наборы движений и арсенал приёмов граничат от приемлемых и адаптируемых, заканчивая парадом безумия и путевкой на костер. Да-да, я говорю про: взрывы на всю арену, длинные комбинации ударов и малым временем на ответные действия, удары с задержкой (Лучше бы сделали для боссов обманные удары/уловки/финты/парирования/адекватный прессинг, что бы поединок с боссом ИМЕННО БЫЛ поединком, но нет, имеем то, что имеем). 
Нечестные говнюки: великаны печи, господа с мечами и птичьей/львиной головой из энир элима, оттуда же жрецы (тот, что охраняет лесенку), древние драконы, кровавые/гнилые собаки, родичи гнили, рунные медведи, почитатели предков с луками и копьями (стрелами их нельзя назвать), штормовые ястребы. Вроде, никого не упустил... Данные господа имеют за собой право гарантированно ударить игрока один раз (а то и вовсе отправить на чекпоинт) из-за трудночитаемых/непрерываемых атак. ДА, можно некоторых грохнуть на расстоянии, но как правило, дрищей бывает больше одного, а сами они - под спидами. А это означает, что будет минус фляга, которая может решить исход боя с боссом или прохождения биома.
Я бы расписал про магию и пеплы войны... Находишь заклинания/молитву для швыряния кирпичей, можно вынести всю игру вперед ногами. В пару мест буду затыки из-за подвижных врагов, но есть и другие заклятия, что эту проблему решают. А пепел "коготь льва" и "грозовой клинок" решают вообще все проблемы, так зачем париться с заклинаниями?)
Пвп скучное и однообразное, как в дс3. все бегают в одной экипировке и билдами. Никакой вариативности и веселья.
Вердикт! 6/10. Удовольствие можно получить, но послевкусие - каждому своё.

review_english: As always, the game consists of assets from previous parts (no matter how bad this is, if you use them correctly). The world is big, but with content... 50 50 The game encourages exploration (the ashes of a cannon and armor), but it also happens that the reward does not correspond to what you went through (a dungeon with two kittens and a snail are prime examples of this). Fortunately, in the DLC with rewards, relatively speaking, everything is in order, although not without its flaws. Everything about the enemies is good, except for repainting the same soldiers with knights (and adding a couple of new moves). Mini-bosses (rare types with a HP bar) birds, crucible knights, trees and worms with an apostle aristocrat cause a lot of problems when you first meet them. And, often, they surprise you with something new at their next meetings. I would like to highlight Oleg separately in Sol Castle. Yes, he is not a boss, but he is strong and will cause a lot of problems. Mini-bosses (frequent mobs with a HP bar) - no comment. Simply unnecessary and inappropriately used. Moreover, the reward for killing them is laughter and that’s all. Yes, there are exceptions (amulet of the roar, anchor, bell spheres, for example), but that’s why they are exceptions, because there are few of them. The bosses are famous (plot side), everything is fine and chic here, but with a caveat. Imagine, you come to a fight, and already on the spot it turns out that your opponent has spiked brass knuckles and a pistol with a trench shotgun. You have bare fists and a desire to get out of this Vyatka circus. And in the process, it also turns out that his snipers are on duty on the neighboring roofs, and if you win, there is a chance to go to prison and pay compensation. This is exactly what a fight with story boys and girls feels like. The movesets and arsenal of techniques range from acceptable and adaptable to a parade of madness and a ticket to the fire. Yes, yes, I’m talking about explosions across the entire arena, long combinations of blows and little time for retaliatory actions, delayed blows (It would be better for the bosses to make deceptive blows, tricks, parry feints, adequate pressure, so that the fight with the boss would EXACTLY be a fight, but no, we have what we have). Dishonest shitty furnace giants, gentlemen with swords and a bird's lion's head made of enir elim, priests from there (the one guarding the ladder), ancient dragons, bloody rotten dogs, relatives of rot, rune bears, ancestor worshipers with bows and spears (they can't be called arrows), storm hawks. It seems that he didn’t miss anyone... These gentlemen have the right to guarantee that they will hit the player once (or even send him to a checkpoint) due to difficult-to-read uninterrupted attacks. YES, you can kill some from a distance, but as a rule, there is more than one slug, and they themselves are under speed. This means that there will be a minus flask, which can decide the outcome of a boss fight or a biome. I would write about magic and the ashes of war... You find spells and prayers for throwing bricks, you can take the whole game forward with your feet. There will be glitches in a couple of places due to moving enemies, but there are other spells that solve this problem. And ashes, “lion’s claw” and “thunderblade” solve all problems, so why bother with spells?) Pvp is boring and monotonous, like in ds3. everyone runs around in the same equipment and builds. No variety or fun. Verdict! 6 10. You can get pleasure, but the aftertaste is to each his own.

review:
I LOVE ELDEN RING, but not all of it. 
so, first things first, i dont like open world games. OW gives so much more room to fill and makes developers focus a lot less on the details and spend A LOT of time with just filling the world. so i dont think elden ring is a great game BECAUSE it is an OW, but DESPITE beeing OW. smooth combat, great bosses, even greater lore (even though it has a lot of incest due to martin). amazing dlc with bosses that kept me awestruck, less good open world but a still great lore.
8/10, love the game, hate open world

review:
Elden Ring ist ohne Zweifel eines der visuell beeindruckendsten und gleichzeitig nervenaufreibendsten Spiele der letzten Jahre. Es bietet eine gigantische, wunderschöne Open World, die einen komplett in ihren Bann zieht – nur um einen Sekunden später mit dem nächsten Boss komplett in die Verzweiflung zu stürzen.

Ich habe das Spiel damals schon mit Elias durchgespielt und man kann es nicht anders sagen: Es war einfach nur sau geil! Aber die Sucht lässt einen nicht los. Momentan läuft mein Solo-Run, bei dem ich mich komplett auf eine Doppel-Friedhofs-Sense spezialisiert habe. Und weil das noch nicht reicht, läuft nebenbei noch ein absolut chaotischer Coop-Run mit Chrisi – natürlich vollgepackt mit Mods.

Aber Elden Ring im Multiplayer schreibt einfach die besten und lustigsten Geschichten, wie wir erst neulich wieder schmerzhaft feststellen mussten:

Die besten Insider aus unseren Runs:
Peter und die Rohstoffe:
Manchmal fragt man sich wirklich, was die Gegner in den Minen eigentlich verbrochen haben. Peter hat es am Anfang perfekt auf den Punkt gebracht, als er mitleidig meinte:

Peter: "Der Arme... er hat da nur so Früchte aufgepickt... Ich: Früchte in der Mine... Peter: Ja Bro, ich weiß doch nicht, was das für Pissklumpen sind das aber, das sieht nicht aus wie Steine."
(Und zack – direkt danach wird Chrisi erst mal von der Klippe geschubst und ist tot. Klassiker!)

Elias und die Orientierungslosigkeit:
Wenn die Panik kickt, weil man von allen Seiten mit Magie beschossen wird, verliert man in den Höhlen schon mal komplett den Verstand. Da wird der Ton dann auch mal etwas lauter:

Elias: "Ey, wo bist du denn?"  Ich: "Ich weiß doch nicht, wo ich langlaufen muss, Alter!" Elias: "Bro, da ist ein langer Gang vorne, und du gehst in irgendeinen Scheiß Seitengang links!" Ich: "Hier steht doch kein Scheiß Schild da, Alter!" Elias: "Was für ein Schild?! Geh einfach... lieber den langen schaurigen Weg nach vorne oder den kleinen Seitengenweg, wo Licht sein wird... den kleinen Scheißweg, Alter! Willst du mich verarschen?! Nein, ich bin runtergefallen!"
(„Eli ist gestorben“ – schöner hätte die Meldung auf dem Bildschirm nicht reinpassen können.)

Egal ob solo mit der Sense, gemoddet mit Chrisi oder damals mit Elias – dieses Spiel ist und bleibt ein genialer Ritt voller wunderschöner Momente und purer Verzweiflung!
Müsst ihr Wissen.

review_english: Elden Ring is without a doubt one of the most visually impressive and, at the same time, most nerve-wracking games of recent years. It offers a gigantic, beautiful open world that completely captivates you, only to plunge you completely into despair a second later with the next boss. I already played through the game with Elias and there's no other way to say it. It was just really cool! But the addiction won't let you go. I'm currently running my solo run, in which I've specialized entirely in a double graveyard scythe. And because that's not enough, there's also an absolutely chaotic co-op run with Chrisi, full of mods. But Elden Ring in multiplayer simply writes the best and funniest stories, as we recently painfully discovered again. The best insiders from our runs Peter and the raw materials Sometimes you really wonder what the opponents in the mines have actually done. Peter summed it up perfectly at the beginning when he said pitifully to Peter, "Poor guy... he was just picking up fruit... I picked up fruit in the mine... Peter Yes, bro, I don't know what kind of lumps of piss they are, but they don't look like stones." (And immediately afterwards, Chrisi is pushed off the cliff and is dead. Classic!) Elias and the disorientation When panic sets in because you are being bombarded with magic from all sides, you completely lose your mind in the caves. Then the sound gets a little louder Elias "Hey, where are you?" Me "I don't know where I have to walk, dude!" Elias "Bro, there's a long hallway in front, and you go into some fucking side hallway to the left!" I "There's no fucking sign here, dude!" Elias "What kind of sign?! ​​Just... better go the long scary way forward or the little side path where there will be light... the little shitty way, dude! Are you kidding me?! No, I fell off!" (Eli has died, the message on the screen couldn't have fit better.) No matter whether solo with the scythe, modded with Chrisi or back then with Elias, this game is and remains an ingenious ride full of wonderful moments and pure desperation! You must know.

review:
Elden Ring takes everything Dark Souls does and adds a huge sense of exploration on top. I already loved Souls games; seeing that same quality in a much larger world felt great.

Sometimes I think the linear structure gives a tighter pace, but this open world isn't bad either. The game delivers both the classic Souls feel and a deep exploration where you find something everywhere you go.

The boss designs, atmosphere, and art direction are incredible. The story is still very scattered and not the kind that everyone will love, but the gameplay and world design more than compensate for this.

Overall: A massive, impressive, and very good experience that expands on the Souls formula.

review:
Jogão absoluto.
Platinei no PS5 (demorou um ano) e agora, depois de vender o console, estou jogando no notebook gamer. Para minha surpresa, está rodando extremamente bem: sem quedas de FPS, visual impecável e praticamente idêntico ao PS5 — a olho nu, não notei diferença alguma.

Resolvi experimentar jogar no mouse e teclado e, mesmo sabendo que o jogo foi pensado para gamepad e que muita gente reclama da adaptação, estou curtindo bastante a experiência. Também coleciono os mangás, então já estou totalmente imersa no universo. O Nightreign, porém, não consegui me adaptar.

Sempre fui mais fã de PC, apesar de ter sido viciada em competitivo por muito tempo. E, sinceramente, o único jogo de história que realmente me prende é ELDEN RING. Agora vou tentar o 100% no mouse e teclado e finalmente partir para a DLC.

Nota: 1.000/10

review:
Elden Ring invites players into a breathtaking open world where grandeur and danger coexist on a monumental scale. This dark fantasy masterpiece seamlessly blends the studio's signature punishing combat with an unparalleled sense of discovery, challenging the tarnished to conquer legendary demigods and forge their own path across the vast Lands Between.

My 75-hour journey was a thrilling and deeply immersive ride as I set my sights on unlocking every single achievement the game has to offer. However, the Lands Between can be as unforgiving with its narrative as it is with its bosses; missing just one specific questline near the end ultimately locked me out of the encounter with Lichdragon Fortissax. While it means I'll have to dive back in for another playthrough to finally claim that last achievement, the core loop of exploration and combat is so incredibly engaging that I'm honestly looking forward to the challenge. It remains a masterfully crafted adventure that captivates from start to finish.

review: Coming from someone who has platinumed the game twice and beaten all of the DLC twice I can confidently say I do not go outside and this masterpiece of a game is the reason why, all though this game is literally the best introduction to a souls game for new players, it makes it very difficult to enjoy other souls as you then walk into them expecting the level of performance that Elden Ring offers. None the less this game is one of, if not FromSofts greatest work. The community is awesome the game has done massive numbers with sales, streams, and popularity. And most of that comes from the alternation from the " git gud " idea to where the player gets to choose what they do. Not to mention the gorgeous vast map with hints of Breath Of The Wild. There is so much to do and so many weapon classes and builds to choose from, you can release full creativity when playing this game which is amazing. What makes the huge open world location even better is the hidden secrets sprinkled around like secret weapons with difficult paths to go through, or caves with fake walls. This game truly does it all, and I am so very grateful that this game has brought me into this amazing community with so many cool people and little inside jokes. Thank you fellow Tarnished-

review:
9.5/10，极其优秀和具有里程碑意义的作品。大家都赞扬过的箱庭地图、探索自由度、流派和职业构建、战斗系统、boss战设计、艺术性等等等等，我就不详细吹了，我说一些我的个人感受：
1.成也剧情，败也剧情。法环剧情延续了魂三部曲的经典套路，黑暗、宏大而有艺术性，魅力无穷。但是剧情本身过于碎片化，如果不借助提示和解析，只会感觉云里雾里的。虽然这是一种独特的剧情设计，但是你也得照顾照顾玩家啊。
2.引导稀碎，逛着逛着就不知道干嘛，主线说得过去，支线一塌糊涂，要么有上篇找不到下篇，要么干脆上篇就找不到，要么一个不注意支线就断了。
3.虎头蛇尾。后期的数值堆砌和素材复用情况慢慢凸显，最终boss战的设计平庸，令人失望。不同结局更是有种省经费的感觉，体验戛然而止，我并不会感到回味无穷，而是会感到迷惑。
4.操作手感和优化，我觉得很差。锁60帧，甚至不调系统设置会有时掉到20帧，遇到稍微密集点的特效会掉到10帧，不可忍受。光影更难绷，开了画面变化不大，但帧数会暴跌数十帧。esc竟然不能暂停，而且法术竟然要一个一个切换，连轮盘都没有，战斗的时候真的会手忙脚乱
话又说回来了，法环让我沉迷的很大一部分就是因为剧情。同时，流派构建的自由度和地形的自由度，可以让你研究出来很多逃课打法，并不会卡关。我挑战了自己一直不敢用的法师职业，通关后的成就感还是很强的。法环独特而又集大成的设计，正是它为王的理由。

review_english: 9.5 10 An extremely excellent and landmark work. Everyone has praised the Hakoba map. Freedom of exploration. Genre and career construction. Combat system. Boss battle design. Artistry, etc.. I won’t go into details. I will talk about some of my personal feelings. 1. Success story, failure story. The Ring of Magic story continues the classic routine of the Soul Trilogy. It is dark, grand, artistic, and endlessly charming. However, the plot itself is too fragmented. If you don’t use hints and analysis, you will only feel confused. Although this is a unique plot design, you still have to take care of the players. 2. The guidance is sparse. You don’t know what to do when you wander around. The main line is reasonable, but the branch lines are a mess. Either there is a previous chapter and you can’t find the next chapter, or you can’t find the next chapter, or one branch line is broken without paying attention to it. 3. Anticlimactic. The value stacking and material reuse in the later period gradually become apparent. The design of the final boss battle is mediocre and disappointing. The different endings have a feeling of saving money, and the experience ends abruptly. I don't feel endless aftertaste, but confused. 4. The operation feel and optimization are very poor. Locking 60 frames will sometimes drop to 20 frames even without adjusting the system settings. When encountering slightly denser special effects, it will drop to 10 frames, which is unbearable. A big part of what makes me addicted to the Ring of Magic is the plot. At the same time, the freedom of genre construction and the freedom of the terrain allow you to develop a lot of truant playing methods without getting stuck. I challenged the mage profession that I have never dared to use. After clearing the level, the sense of accomplishment is still very strong. The unique and integrated design of the Magic Ring is the reason why it is the king.

review: Bonjour, au debut j'ai commencé comme samurai, en vue de mes 40h de jeu avec seullement 2 boss tué, j'ai abandonée, j'ai repris le jeu en pensant que si je prenais un truc a distances sa serait plus faciile, comme un sorcier, j'ai regardé les tutos pour avoir un build op, one shot avec le mage, et juste par le fait que j'ai du chercher differents objets et chalenges pour monter mon build sa mas permis de plonger dans une aventure, J'ai obtenu tout ce que je souhaité, je pensait que c'est finit, je vais rouler sur le jeu, je me suis trompé, maitenant je traine dans tous les dongons du jeu pour les resoudre et trouver des adversaires fort, vue que je suis nul, mais que avec le build que j'ai c'est fesable, c'est boucoup plus interesant que de plonger dans le desespoir de la dificulté, jouez ce que vous plait, prenais les detours, decouvrez des secrets, explorez et améliorez vous ou vous equipement, ce jeu vaut le coup. Meme si vous ete aussi puissant que Luky vous aller vite voir que il y a beaucoup de Hulk dans ce jeu xD.

review_english: Hello, at the beginning I started as a samurai, in view of my 40 hours of play with only 2 bosses killed, I gave up, I started the game again thinking that if I took something remotely it would be easier, like a wizard, I watched the tutorials to have a build op, one shot with the mage, and just by the fact that I had to look for different objects and challenges to put together my build it allowed me to dive into a adventure, I got everything I wanted, I thought it was over, I'm going to play the game, I was wrong, now I'm hanging out in all the dungons of the game to solve them and find strong opponents, since I'm bad, but with the build I have it's doable, it's much more interesting than plunging into despair of difficulty, play what you like, take the detours, discover secrets, explore and improve yourself or your equipment, this game is worth it.
